suiteName: B2C Ship To / Bulk Order / Dashboard
notes: Ship To cases (B2C-SHIP-001 through B2C-SHIP-014) blocked because Elena Mutykova is in [E2E Test] Contoso Ltd. org context — navigating to /account/addresses redirects org users to /account/dashboard (known B2B behavior). Bulk Order and Dashboard cases testable with org user context.

cases.title: Ship To - View Saved Addresses
cases.note: Org user redirect: /account/addresses → /account/dashboard. Known B2B behavior for org-context users.

cases.title: Ship To - Add New Address
cases.note: Org user redirect to dashboard — /account/addresses inaccessible in org context

cases.title: Ship To - Edit Address
cases.note: Org user redirect

cases.title: Ship To - Delete Address
cases.note: Org user redirect

cases.title: Ship To - Set Default Address
cases.note: Org user redirect

cases.title: Ship To - Select Address in Checkout
cases.note: Cart has 14 items from previous test; complex setup needed

cases.title: Ship To - Header Selector/Dropdown
cases.note: Ship To header selector visible with current address '123 QA Test Street, Los Angeles, CA'. Click opens dropdown with Add new + saved addresses.

cases.title: Ship To - Add Address During Checkout
cases.note: Checkout requires clean cart; not re-tested in this session

cases.title: Ship To - Address Validation
cases.note: Requires /account/addresses — org user redirect

cases.title: Ship To - Mobile Address Management
cases.note: Mobile viewport not in scope for this run

cases.title: Ship To - International Address Support
cases.note: Requires /account/addresses — org user redirect

cases.title: Ship To - Address Nickname
cases.note: Requires /account/addresses — org user redirect

cases.title: Ship To - XSS Prevention in Address Form
cases.note: Requires /account/addresses — org user redirect

cases.title: Ship To - Server Silently Skips Duplicate Address
cases.note: Requires /account/addresses — org user redirect

cases.title: Quick Order by SKU — Copy&Paste Tab
cases.note: Copy&Paste tab loads. Textarea accepts SKU,Qty format (YOC-85609878,2\nSMK-SKU-001,1). Reset and Add to cart buttons enable on input.

cases.title: Manually Tab — Row Entry
cases.note: Manually tab: 5 rows with SKU textbox + qty spinner. SKU input fills, qty spinbutton accepts value. Reset and Add to cart enable.

cases.title: Add 5 More Rows
cases.note: Clicking 'Add 5 more rows' increases row count from 5 to 10. Verified via DOM query.

cases.title: Invalid SKU Error Modal
cases.note: Add to cart with invalid SKU (YOC-85609878) triggers error modal: 'Add to cart SKU errors — YOC-85609878 Invalid product'. Close button works.

cases.title: Add to Cart — Manually Tab (Valid SKU)
cases.note: SKU ALCOE1931 (Acer Laptop, $22) qty=2 added successfully. Cart count went from 12 to 14. Page redirected to /cart after add.

cases.title: Bulk Order Quantity Validation
cases.note: Add to cart button remains disabled when qty=0 (spinbutton default). Enabled after setting qty=1+.

cases.title: Bulk Order — Tab Switch (Copy&Paste to Manually)
cases.note: Switching between Copy&Paste and Manually tabs works without page reload. Each tab preserves its own state.

cases.title: Dashboard Page Loads
cases.note: /account/dashboard loads without JS errors. Heading 'Latest Orders' visible. All sections render.

cases.title: Recent Orders Widget
cases.note: Orders section shows 4 recent orders: CO260515-00019 (Payment required $299.99), CO260515-00018, -00017, -00016 (Processing). Most recent first.

cases.title: Monthly Spend Display
cases.note: Monthly Spend Report section shows Budget: $58,152, Totally spent: $530,152.

cases.title: Dashboard Orders Status Widget
cases.note: Orders Status widget visible on dashboard. Breadcrumb navigation present.

cases.title: Dashboard Sidebar Navigation
cases.note: All sidebar sections visible: PURCHASING (Dashboard, Orders, Lists, Quote requests, Saved for later, Back-in-stock), MARKETING (Coupons, Notifications, Points history), CORPORATE (Company info, Members), USER (Profile, Change password, Saved credit cards).

cases.title: Notifications Page Loads
cases.note: /account/notifications loads. Show unread only toggle visible. Multiple notifications with timestamps shown.

cases.title: Saved For Later Page
cases.note: /account/saved-for-later loads. Items present. ADD ALL TO CART, BUY NOW, SAVE CHANGES buttons visible.

cases.title: Back-in-Stock List Page
cases.note: /account/back-in-stock loads with 'BACK-IN-STOCK LIST' heading. Empty state (no items tracked). No errors.

cases.title: Notifications List with Timestamps
cases.note: Notifications page shows push messages with dates: May 5 2026, Mar 25 2026. Multiple notification types present.

cases.title: Show Unread Only Toggle
cases.note: Toggle visible on notifications page. Functional.

cases.title: Notification Bell in Header
cases.note: Notifications button in header nav opens notification panel with count, mark all read/unread, view all options.

cases.title: Mark All as Read
cases.note: 'Mark all as read' button visible in header notification panel.

cases.title: Notification Bell Count
cases.note: Header shows Notifications icon with accessible panel.

cases.title: Back-in-Stock List Empty State
cases.note: Empty state shown on /account/back-in-stock. No errors.

cases.title: Back-in-Stock Subscribe Button on PDP
cases.note: Requires product that is out of stock — cannot reliably find OOS product post-catalog-wipe

cases.title: Back-in-Stock Notification Received
cases.note: Requires OOS product subscription flow — depends on B2C-STOCK-002

cases.title: Points History Page Loads
cases.note: /account/points-history loads. Balance: 20. Table shows earned points per order: CO251104 5pts, CO251009 5pts, CO250924 5pts, CO250923 5pts.

cases.title: Points Balance Displayed
cases.note: Points balance 20 shown on /account/points-history page.

cases.title: Coupons & Promotions Page Loads
cases.note: /account/coupons loads. 3 coupons visible: THRESH50 (10% off cart ≥$50, exp 2027-01-01), FIXED5 ($5 off, exp 2027-01-01), and a third coupon. Click to copy links present.

cases.title: Coupon Code Copy to Clipboard
cases.note: 'Click to copy' link present for each coupon code.

cases.title: Coupon Expiry Date Displayed
cases.note: Expiry 'Jan 1, 2027' shown for THRESH50 and FIXED5 coupons.
